steps.title: Locate Power Switch
steps.instruction: Locate the power switch. Tap the table to place the AR arrow on the switch area, then say Next.

steps.title: Inspect and Mark
steps.instruction: Inspect the connectors. Use your finger to draw a circle around any signs of corrosion on screen, then say Next.

steps.title: Check Indicator Light
steps.instruction: Confirm the indicator light is solid green. If it is flashing or red, mark it and report it. Then say Next.

steps.title: Listen for Abnormal Noise
steps.instruction: Listen for any abnormal buzzing or grinding. If you hear anything unusual, note it. Then say Next.

steps.title: Verify
steps.instruction: Verification complete. Say Done to log this inspection and finish the SOP.
